goal: Rename gad-eval-spawn to align with gad-212 vocabulary refresh. Operator 2026-04-22: 'no idea what orchestration you are talking about. but we can rename.' Clarification: gad-eval-spawn is NOT a pure CLI wrapper — it performs 9-step orchestration (parse args, run 'gad eval run --execute' to get EXEC.json, refuse-if-duplicate, create git worktree, write .planning/.eval-runs/<id>.json session marker, spawn general-purpose subagent with isolation=worktree + prompt from EXEC.json, on completion run 'gad eval preserve', clean worktree, report status). The subagent dispatch + worktree isolation + session marker + cleanup IS the orchestration — CLI is called mid-flow, not around it. Action: rename skill + workflow + frontmatter from gad-eval-spawn → gad-generation-spawn (matches decision gad-219 'gad generation spawn' CLI verb). Update body to use species/generation vocabulary throughout. Keep the orchestration intact — it's the canonical plan/build seam per decision forge-09.
